name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement

---

## Summary

<!-- A one-sentence summary of the feature you're requesting. -->

## Problem / Motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? What are you trying to do that you can't do today? -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature in detail. How would it work from a user's perspective? -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? Why do you prefer your proposed solution? -->

## Mockups / Examples

<!-- If you have wireframes, screenshots from other apps, or written examples, add them here. -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, links, or references that might help. -->
